sqlCommand.descr: declare @lvdBoYear date = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), 1, 1); EXEC [CorpAcct_Apps].[dbo].[PROC_S02_FRS_Entries] @lvdBoYear
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL < '4019900' or GL like '533%' or GL > '5449901')
update TransX set Flex5 = Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'
update TransX set Flex4 = Contract, Flex5 = TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0
update TransX set Flex4 = Ledger + ' ' + Contract where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Contract, Flex1, UWYR, Co, Amt1, GL, PC, Flex2, Ledger, TP, BusCat, TTY) SELECT '[batchID]',policy,sub_contract,UWYR,company,round(cast(amt1 as money),2),gl,orc_pc,hud_pc,ledger,tp,buscat,tty from CorpAcct_Apps.dbo.S02_FRS_Entries
update TransX set Co = case Co when 'HUD' then '2300' when 'HSC' then '2400' when 'HEI' then '2450' else Co end from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'FRS'

update TransX set Flex3 = 'm - Treaty', Flex4 = orc_contract, TPname = orc_contract from TransX inner join CorpAcct_Apps.dbo.S02_Contract_Map m on contract = policy_no where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'FRS'

update TransX set Flex3 = 'm - Treaty', Flex4 = orc_contract, Flex2 = '1402000101' from TransX inner join CorpAcct_Apps.dbo.S02_Contract_Map m on contract = policy_no where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2400','2450')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, TP, TPname, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4, Amt1) (select KeyID, 'UG' as Ledger, Co, GL, PC, TP, TPname, BusCat, Flex1 as Contract, UWyr,TTY, Flex2,Flex3,Flex4, -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'FRS')
update TransX set Flex4 = Contract, TPname = Contract from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract like 'A&HPEQS%'
update TransX set Ledger = 'Z000', Flex1 = 'pass2' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWyr,TTY,Flex1,Flex2,Flex4, Amt1) (select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, isnull(CC,''), TP, BusCat, Flex4, UWyr,TTY, 'pass1', Flex2,contract, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set Amt1 = round(0-Amt1,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass2'

update TransX set GL = m.Descr, GLdesc = c.Descr, Contract = t.Flex4, TP = Co, Co = '2008', Flex1 = 'pass3', BusCat = '21' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on GL = ID inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap3' and KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Flex1 = 'pass2' and Co <> '2008'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass1' and GL like '%9900'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, '' as PC, '' as CC, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, Contract, isnull(UWYR,'') as UWYR, '' as TTY, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass4' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 <> 'pass1' and GL > '4000000' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL,  Contract, isnull(UWYR,''))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 in ('pass2','pass3') or Amt1 = 0)
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY, UWYR, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
